title: tragacantha coriacea
intro: Tragacantha coriacea, also known as the prickly chaff flower or needle bush, is a type of spiny shrub native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Tragacantha coriacea is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
